home.title: Vite React Router
home.subtitle: Modern Server-Side Rendering (SSR) Starter Template
home.description: A production-ready starter boilerplate integrating React Router 7 (SSR), Tailwind CSS 4, i18n, Zustand 5, Socket.io, and Three.js in a robust and clean layout.

performance.title: React Router 7 SSR
performance.description: Full server-side rendering (SSR) support with integrated data loading, layout engines, and route type generation.

routing.title: Routing & Layouts
routing.description: Nested layouts, dynamic ':lang' localized routing segment, and client/server lifecycle wrappers.

i18n.title: i18n URL Routing
i18n.description: Locale-based routing switch and detection (/en-US, /th-TH, /ja-JP) utilizing robust i18next bundles.

theme.title: Tailwind CSS 4 & Theme
theme.description: Modern dark/light theme switching utilizing Tailwind v4 css variables and hydrated Zustand state.

socket.title: Real-time Socket.io
socket.description: Bidirectional real-time client-server events showing active count and live socket status.

state.title: Zustand & 3D Graphics
state.description: Lightweight global state manager paired with responsive WebGL 3D scenes using React Three Fiber.

about.title: About This Starter
about.description: This template serves as a production-grade blueprint for developing modern React web applications featuring top SEO performance, speed, and standard SSR capabilities.
about.architecture_desc: Built with the new standard 'app/' directory of React Router 7. Routing is centralized in routes.ts, layout is managed in layout.tsx/root.tsx, and styling uses CSS-only Tailwind 4 config.

socket.title: Socket.io Connection Demo
socket.description: Real-time connection status and player count synchronization.
socket.feature_realtime_desc: Bidirectional event-based communication between client and server with automatic reconnection support.
socket.feature_websocket_desc: Efficient full-duplex communication over a single TCP connection with minimal latency overhead.
socket.feature_scalable_desc: Built-in support for channel-based broadcasting, rooms, namespaces, and horizontal scaling with adapters.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Test your server authentication flow — login with email/password or Google OAuth, check auth status, and sign out.
auth.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.name: Name
auth.delete_account_confirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

threejs.title: Three.js Interactive Scene
threejs.description: Interactive 3D graphics powered by Three.js with React-three-fiber — explore geometric shapes and real-time rendering.
threejs.feature_renderer_desc: Hardware-accelerated 3D rendering using WebGL for high-performance graphics across all modern browsers.
threejs.feature_interaction_desc: Orbit controls allow you to rotate, pan, and zoom around the 3D scene with intuitive mouse and touch gestures.
threejs.feature_shapes_desc: Various 3D shapes with different materials, colors, and real-time animations rendered in a unified scene.

error.notFound: The requested page could not be found.

notfound.title: Page Not Found
notfound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
